title: Excelsior
content:
Over his head were the maple buds,
    And over the tree was the moon,
    And over the moon were the starry studs
    That drop from the angels' shoon.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ralph Waldo Emerson, titled "Excelsior", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
